ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "percent_housing_crowded" REAL /* Percentage of housing units that are overcrowded */,
  "percent_households_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of households living below the poverty line */,
  "percent_unemployed_aged_16_plus" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aged 16 and older who are unemployed */,
  "percent_without_high_school_diploma_aged_25_plus" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aged 25 and older without a high school diploma */,
  "percent_aged_under_18_or_over_64" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aged under 18 or over 64 years old */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income of the community area */,
  "hardship_index" INTEGER /* Hardship index rating of the community area */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the community area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the community area */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the community area */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the community in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_conditions" (
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "total_houses" INTEGER /* Total number of houses in the area */,
  "average_housing_value" REAL /* Average value of housing units */,
  "percent_renter_occupied" REAL /* Percentage of housing units that are renter-occupied */,
  "percent_owner_occupied" REAL /* Percentage of housing units that are owner-occupied */,
  "median_household_size" REAL /* Median number of people per household */,
  "percent_vacant_houses" REAL /* Percentage of vacant houses */,
  "percent_houses_with_utilities" REAL /* Percentage of houses with utilities (electricity, water, etc.) */,
  "average_house_age" REAL /* Average age of houses in the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "percent_high_school_graduates" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who graduated high school */,
  "percent_college_graduates" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who graduated from college */,
  "percent_postgraduate" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who have postgraduate degrees */,
  "percent_with_some_college" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with some college education but no degree */,
  "percent_with_associate_degree" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with an associate degree */,
  "percent_with_technical_degree" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with a technical or vocational degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "total_workforce" INTEGER /* Total number of people in the workforce */,
  "percent_unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of the workforce that is unemployed */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for employed individuals in the area */,
  "percent_part_time_employment" REAL /* Percentage of individuals employed part-time */,
  "percent_full_time_employment" REAL /* Percentage of individuals employed full-time */,
  "percent_self_employed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals who are self-employed */,
  "average_hours_worked_per_week" REAL /* Average number of hours worked per week by employed individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_indices" (
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "percent_children_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of children living below the poverty line */,
  "percent_seniors_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of seniors living below the poverty line */,
  "average_poverty_duration" REAL /* Average duration in months that families remain in poverty */,
  "percent_disabled_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of disabled individuals living below the poverty line */,
  "percent_single_parent_families_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of single-parent families living below the poverty line */,
  "percent_minority_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of minority individuals living below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider or organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the service provider */,
  "service_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the service provider */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service provided */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the service provider */,
  "service_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_services_community_area_number FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_number") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., educational, recreational, health-related) */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization or individual organizing the event */,
  "event_cost" REAL /* Cost of attending the event (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_events_community_area_number FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_number") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Reference to community area */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., food bank, shelter) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource provider */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the resource */,
  "resource_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the resource provider */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the resource provider */,
  "resource_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the resource provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_community_area_number FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_number") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, community organizer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the user represents */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
